pending.body: Propagate non-cancellation errors from the aborted-task fast paths in `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs`. After `drive_dispatch_multi_repo()` / `drive_dispatch()` returns, the code at lines 844-862 and 1545-1548 exits as soon as `latest_task.status == TaskStatus::Aborted`, without inspecting `outcome`. That drops the new errors returned by `finish_cancelled_dispatch()` at lines 3003-3114 (for example, failed backend-process cleanup during daemon shutdown/cancellation), then still releases the task lease and reports a clean abort. Only `Ok(())` / `Err(AppError::InvocationCancelled { .. })` should be swallowed here; any other error needs to surface before the lease is cleared.
